tasks.label: start ai agent
tasks.command: $ports = @(8080, 8000); foreach ($port in $ports) { Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.State -eq 'Listen' } | ForEach-Object { $processId = $_.OwningProcess; if ($processId -and $processId -ne $PID) { Stop-Process -Id $processId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } }; $env:AI_MODEL='gemini-2.0-flash-lite'; & '${workspaceFolder}\AI-Agent\AI_agent_run\backend\.venv\Scripts\python.exe' -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000 --reload

tasks.label: cleanup backend ports
tasks.command: $ports = @(8080, 8000); foreach ($port in $ports) { Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.State -eq 'Listen' } | ForEach-Object { $processId = $_.OwningProcess; if ($processId -and $processId -ne $PID) { Stop-Process -Id $processId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } }

tasks.label: stop ai agent
tasks.command: Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.State -eq 'Listen' } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }
